inputs.titre: L'Héritage de Michel Rocard : Artisan du Dialogue Social

reason: This image is not suitable for the event 'L'Héritage de Michel Rocard : Artisan du Dialogue Social' (2016) because it features a flat-screen television displaying a video call. Flat-screen televisions are anachronistic for the 1980s, the period in which Michel Rocard was most politically active. Modern suits and hairstyles also suggest the picture was not taken in the 1980s.
